_comment: Ridgeline Finance OS MCP server. Copy this block into your MCP client config (Claude Desktop: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json). Update the cwd path and DATABASE_URL to match your machine, then restart the client. The stateful tools (run/sign-off/freeze/policies) need DATABASE_URL; the deterministic tools (estimate, price) run from the data files with no DB.
